title: WebSocket Upgrade Handshake
description: Analyze the WebSocket upgrade handshake, including the 101 Switching Protocols response. Deconstruct the architectural costs associated with maintaining stateful, long-lived TCP WebSocket connections. Design strategies for scaling WebSocket servers to handle numerous concurrent connections.
objectives: Analyze the WebSocket upgrade handshake, including the 101 Switching Protocols response.
Deconstruct the architectural costs associated with maintaining stateful, long-lived TCP WebSocket connections.
Design strategies for scaling WebSocket servers to handle numerous concurrent connections.
